request_payload.exposure_text: As a retired FBI counterterrorism analyst, I've seen firsthand how our current security laws leave gaps that terrorists exploit. The 2024 National Security Review found that 78% of thwarted attacks relied on vulnerabilities in domestic surveillance authorities. We need to empower our agencies to act decisively while maintaining proper oversight. The European model shows we can balance security and civil liberties - their expanded powers haven't led to abuses. #NationalSecurityMatters #ProtectOurFamilies
